subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him, the Intended One, Who is worthy and befitting, Who hath illumined the hearts of them that recognize His unity with the light of knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که اقئده موحدین را بنور معرفت منور فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God
